bounded_function: States what a LIMEN process observed or processed
vc_analogue: Potential issuer of a process-bounded statement
scitt_analogue: May submit a signed statement or artifact digest to a transparency service
non_claim_guard: Not a hardware-rooted trust anchor; no truth, legality, compliance, or safety claim
paper_use: Methods table on actor roles and trust boundaries

bounded_function: Bind captured bytes, normalized text, and schema versions to a receipt
vc_analogue: Credential subject evidence or supporting properties
scitt_analogue: Statement payload or artifact digest prior to logging
c2pa_relevance: May anchor extracted text from media carrying content credentials
non_claim_guard: Integrity trace only; does not validate allegation correctness
paper_use: Appendix on provenance fields and reproducibility

bounded_function: Record bounded appraisal of envelope completeness or caution flags
vc_analogue: Verifier note outside or alongside the credential
scitt_analogue: Pre-log QA or post-log review metadata
c2pa_relevance: Can flag media-provenance ambiguity but not settle authenticity

bounded_function: Expose placeholder or future log-inclusion metadata
scitt_analogue: Transparency receipt / inclusion proof / statement registration
c2pa_relevance: None unless the source itself has content credentials
non_claim_guard: Publication witness only; not substantive validation

bounded_function: Show how the envelope could be wrapped for portable exchange
non_claim_guard: Draft packaging only unless issued and verified

bounded_function: Reserve slots for detached-signature wiring and key metadata
vc_analogue: Potential proof binding or status metadata
scitt_analogue: Can later bind to a logged digest or statement
non_claim_guard: Placeholder only; no signature existence or verification implied

bounded_function: Describe whether source-side provenance signals matter for the observed case
vc_analogue: Can be referenced as supporting provenance context
scitt_analogue: Could be hashed or logged as an observed artifact
c2pa_relevance: Directly relevant when synthetic-media provenance is itself at issue
non_claim_guard: Content credentials are evidence inputs, not final authenticity or legality judgments

bounded_function: Constrain the envelope to observation and processing only
c2pa_relevance: Boundary reminder when media provenance is mentioned
non_claim_guard: Must exclude truth, legality, compliance, certification, safety, completeness, and sometimes authenticity_finality

bounded_function: Link receipts to tables, figures, and dashboards derived from bounded inputs
vc_analogue: Credential subject or evidence about an artifact
scitt_analogue: Logged artifact manifest or derived-file receipt
c2pa_relevance: Can carry observed media-provenance metadata into derived artifacts
non_claim_guard: Derived artifact provenance only; not proof of substantive correctness
paper_use: Dashboard provenance caption or appendix note
